state.description: Creates (C(present)) or removes (C(absent)) a FlashCopy consistency group.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the M(ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_auth) module.

ownershipgroup.description: Specifies the name of the ownership group. Parameters I(ownershipgroup) and I(noownershipgroup) are mutually exclusive. Valid when I(state=present), to create or modify a FlashCopy consistency group.

noownershipgroup.description: If specified True, the consistency group is removed from all associated ownership groups. Parameters I(noownershipgroup) and I(ownershipgroup) are mutually exclusive. Valid when I(state=present), to modify a FlashCopy consistency group.

force.description: If specified True, removes all the associated FlashCopy mappings while deleting the FlashCopy consistency group. Valid when I(state=absent), to delete a FlashCopy consistency group.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_cv.short_description: This module manages the change volume for a given volume on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_cv.description: Ansible interface to manage the change volume in remote copy replication on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems.

state.description: Creates or updates (C(present)) or removes (C(absent)), a change volume.

rname.description: Specifies the name of the remote copy relationship.

cvname.description: Specifies the name to assign to the master or auxiliary change volume.

basevolume.description: Specifies the base volume name (master or auxiliary). Required when I(state=present), to create the change volume.

ismaster.description: Specifies whether the change volume is being (dis)associated with master cluster. Required when the change volume is being associated or disassociated from the master cluster.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_fl.short_description: This module manages FlashCopy mappings on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_fl.description: Ansible interface to manage 'mkfcmap', 'rmfcmap', and 'chfcmap' volume commands. This module configures "clone", "snapshot" or "backup" type FlashCopy mappings.

name.description: Specifies the name of the FlashCopy mapping.

state.description: Creates or updates (C(present)) or removes (C(absent)) a FlashCopy mapping.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

copytype.description: Specifies the copy type when creating the FlashCopy mapping. Required when I(state=present), to create a FlashCopy mapping.

source.description: Specifies the name of the source volume. Required when I(state=present), to create a FlashCopy mapping.

target.description: Specifies the name of the target volume. Required when I(state=present), to create a FlashCopy mapping.

mdiskgrp.description: Specifies the name of the storage pool to use when creating the target volume. If unspecified, the pool associated with the source volume is used. Valid when I(state=present), to create a FlashCopy mapping.

consistgrp.description: Specifies the name of the consistency group to which the FlashCopy mapping is to be added. Parameters I(consistgrp) and I(noconsistgrp) are mutually exclusive. Valid when I(state=present), to create or modify a FlashCopy mapping.

noconsistgrp.description: If specified True, FlashCopy mapping is removed from the consistency group. Parameters I(noconsistgrp) and I(consistgrp) are mutually exclusive. Valid when I(state=present), to modify a FlashCopy mapping.

copyrate.description: Specifies the copy rate. The rate varies between 0-150. If unspecified, the default copy rate of 50 for clone and 0 for snapshot is used. Valid when I(state=present), to create or modify a FlashCopy mapping.

cleanrate.description: Specifies the clean rate. The rate varies between 0-150. If unspecified, the default clean rate is 50. Valid when I(state=present), to create or modify a FlashCopy mapping.

grainsize.description: Specifies the grain size for the FlashCopy mapping. The grainsize can be set to 64 or 256. The default value is 256. Valid when I(state=present), to create a FlashCopy mapping.

force.description: Brings the target volume online. This parameter is required if the FlashCopy mapping is in the stopped state. Valid when I(state=absent), to delete a FlashCopy mapping.

old_name.description: Specifies the old name of an mdiskgrp. Applies when I(state=present), to rename the existing mdiskgrp.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_ip.short_description: This module manages IP provisioning on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_ip.description: Ansible interface to manage 'mkip' and 'rmip' commands. This module can run on all IBM Storage Virtualize systems running on 8.4.2.0 or later.

state.description: Creates (C(present)) or removes (C(absent)) an IP address.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

node.description: Specifies the name of the node.

port.description: Specifies a port ranging from 1 - 16 to which IP shall be assigned.

portset.description: Specifies the name of the portset object.

subnet_prefix.description: Specifies the prefix of subnet mask. Required when I(state=present).

gateway.description: Specifies the gateway address. Applies when I(state=present).

vlan.description: Specifies a vlan id ranging from 1 - 4096. Applies when I(state=present).

resetgateway.description: Specifies whether to reset the gateway to None. Applies when I(state=present).

resetvlan.description: Specifies whether to reset the vlan to None. Applies when I(state=present).

old_ip_address.description: Specifies the old IP address to be changed. If not provided, the value of I(ip_address) will be used. Applies when I(state=present).

shareip.description: Specifies the flag when IP is shared between multiple portsets. Applies when I(state=present).

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_mi.short_description: This module manages volume migration between clusters on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_mi.description: Ansible interface to manage the migration commands.

type_of_migration.description: Specifies the type of migration whether it is migration across pools or migration across clusters

new_pool.description: Specifies the pool on which the volume has to be migrated. Valid only when I(type_of_migration=across_pools).

source_volume.description: Specifies the name of the existing source volume to be used in migration. Required when I(state=initiate) or I(state=cleanup) or I(type_of_migration=across_pools).

target_volume.description: Specifies the name of the volume to be created on the target system. Required when I(state=initiate).

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

remote_cluster.description: Specifies the name of the remote cluster. Required when I(state=initiate).

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user on the local system.

remote_username.description: REST API username for the partner Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(remote_username) and I(remote_password) are required if not using I(remote_token) to authenticate a user on the partner system. Valid when C(state=initiate).

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user on the local system.

remote_password.description: REST API password for the partner Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(remote_username) and I(remote_password) are required if not using I(remote_token) to authenticate a user on the partner system. Valid when I(state=initiate).

relationship_name.description: Name of the migration relationship. Required when I(state=initiate) or I(state=switch).

state.description: Specifies the different states of the migration process when I(type_of_migration=across_clusters). C(initiate), creates a volume on remote cluster; optionally used to replicate hosts, and to create and start a migration relationship. C(switch), switches the migration relationship direction allowing write access on the target volume. C(cleanup), deletes the source volume and migration relationship after a 'switch'.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

remote_token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the partner Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module. Valid when I(state=initiate).

remote_pool.description: Specifies the pool on which the volume on Partner Storage Virtualize system should get created. Required when I(state=initiate).

remote_validate_certs.description: Validates certification for partner Storage Virtualize system. Valid when I(state=initiate).

replicate_hosts.description: Replicates the hosts mapped to a source volume on the source system, to the target system, and maps the hosts to the target volume. The user can use ibm_svc_host and ibm_svc_vol_map modules to create and map hosts to the target volume for an existing migration relationship. Valid when I(state=initiate).

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_mi.short_description: This module manages mirrored volumes on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_mi.description: Ansible interface to manage 'mkvolume', 'addvolumecopy', 'rmvolumecopy', and 'rmvolume' volume commands.

name.description: Specifies the name to assign to the new volume.

state.description: Creates (C(present)) or removes (C(absent)) a mirrored volume.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

poolA.description: Specifies the name of first storage pool to be used when creating a mirrored volume.

poolB.description: Specifies the name of second storage pool to be used when creating a mirrored volume.

type.description: Specifies the desired volume type. When the type is C(local hyperswap), a HyperSwap volume gets created. When the type is C(standard) and values for I(PoolA) and I(PoolB) arguments are also specified, a "standard mirror" volume gets created. If a "standard" mirrored volume exists and either I(PoolA) or I(PoolB) is specified, the mirrored volume gets converted to a standard volume.

thin.description: Specifies if the volume to be created is thin-provisioned.

compressed.description: Specifies if the volume to be created is compressed.

deduplicated.description: Specifies if the volume to be created is deduplicated.

grainsize.description: Specifies the grain size (in KB) to use when creating the HyperSwap volume.

rsize.description: Specifies the rsize (buffersize) in %. Defines how much physical space is initially allocated to the thin-provisioned or compressed volume.

size.description: Specifies the size of mirrored volume in MB. This can also be used to resize a mirrored volume. When resizing, only mandatory parameters can be passed.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_ow.short_description: This module manages ownership group on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_ow.description: Ansible interface to manage 'mkownershipgroup' and 'rmownershipgroup' commands.

name.description: Specifies the name or label for the new ownership group object.

state.description: Creates (C(present)) or removes (C(absent)) an ownership group.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the M(ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_auth) module.

keepobjects.description: If specified, the objects that currently belong to the ownership group will be kept but will be moved to noownershipgroup. Applies when I(state=disabled).

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_po.short_description: This module manages portset configuration on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_po.description: Ansible interface to manage IP and Fibre Channel (FC) portsets using 'mkportset', 'chportset', and 'rmportset' commands.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the M(ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_auth) module.

state.description: Creates (C(present)) or Deletes (C(absent)) the IP portset.

name.description: Specifies the name of portset.

porttype.description: Specifies the type of port that can be mapped to the portset. Applies when I(state=present). If not specified, I(porttype=ethernet) will be used to manage IP portset.

portset_type.description: Specifies the type for the portset. Applies only during creation of portset. If not specified, I(portset_type=host) will be used.

ownershipgroup.description: The name of the ownership group to which the portset object is being mapped. Parameters I(ownershipgroup) and I(noownershipgroup) are mutually exclusive. Applies when I(state=present).

noownershipgroup.description: Specify to remove the ownership group from portset. Parameters I(ownershipgroup) and I(noownershipgroup) are mutually exclusive. Applies only during updation of portset.

old_name.description: Specifies the old name of the portset while renaming. Valid when I(state=present), to rename an existing host.

replicationportsetlinkuid.description: Change the replication_portset_link_uid parameter of the portset.

resetreplicationportsetlinkuid.description: Reset the replication_portset_link_uid parameter to a newly generated portset link UID.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_re.short_description: This module manages remote copies (or rcrelationship) on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_re.description: Ansible interface to manage remote copy replication.

name.description: Specifies the name to assign to the new remote copy relationship or to operate on the existing remote copy.

state.description: Creates or updates (C(present)), removes (C(absent)) a remote copy relationship.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

copytype.description: Specifies the mirror type of the remote copy. 'metro' means MetroMirror, 'global' means GlobalMirror, and 'GMCV' means GlobalMirror with change volume. If not specified, a MetroMirror remote copy will be created when creating a remote copy I(state=present).

master.description: Specifies the master volume name when creating a remote copy.

aux.description: Specifies the auxiliary volume name when creating a remote copy.

cyclingperiod.description: Specifies the cycle period in seconds. The default cycle is of 300 seconds.

remotecluster.description: Specifies the name of remote cluster when creating a remote copy.

sync.description: Specifies whether to create a synchronized relationship.

force.description: Specifies that the relationship must be deleted even if it results in the secondary volume containing inconsistent data.

consistgrp.description: Specifies a consistency group that this relationship will join. If not specified by user, the relationship is created as a stand-alone relationship. Applies when I(state=present).

noconsistgrp.description: Specifies whether to remove the specified relationship from a consistency group, making the relationship a stand-alone relationship. Applies when I(state=present).

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_re.short_description: This module manages remote copy consistency group on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_re.description: Ansible interface to manage 'mkrcconsistgrp', 'chrcconsistgrp', and 'rmrcconsistgrp' remote copy consistency group commands.

name.description: Specifies the name for the new consistency group.

state.description: Creates or updates (C(present)) removes (C(absent)) a consistency group.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

remotecluster.description: Specifies the name of the remote system. Only used while creating a consistency group.

force.description: If used to delete a consistency group, it specifies that you want the system to remove any relationship that belongs to the consistency group before the group is deleted. If used to start a consistency group, it specifies that you want the system to process the copy operation even if it causes a temporary loss of consistency during synchronization. It is required if the consistency group is in the ConsistentStopped state, but is not synchronized or is in the idling state - except if consistency protection is configured.

copytype.description: Specifies the mirror type of the remote copy. 'metro' means MetroMirror, 'global' means GlobalMirror. If not specified, a MetroMirror remote copy will be created when creating a remote copy I(state=present).

cyclingmode.description: Specifies the behavior of Global Mirror for the relationship. Active-active relationships and relationships with cycling modes set to Multiple must always be configured with change volumes. Applies when I(state=present) and I(copytype=global).

cyclingperiod.description: Specifies the cycle period in seconds.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_sa.short_description: This module manages safeguarded policy configuration on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_sa.description: Ansible interface to manage 'mksafeguardedpolicy' and 'rmsafeguardedpolicy' safeguarded policy commands. Safeguarded copy functionality is introduced in IBM Storage Virtualize 8.4.2.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the M(ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_auth) module.

state.description: Creates (C(present)) or deletes (C(absent)) a safeguarded policy. Resume (C(resume)) or suspend (C(suspend)) the safeguarded copy functionality system wide.

name.description: Specifies the name of safeguarded policy. Not applicable when I(state=suspend) or I(state=resume).

backupunit.description: Specify the backup unit in mentioned metric. Applies when I(state=present).

backupinterval.description: Specifies the interval of backup. Applies when I(state=present).

backupstarttime.description: Specifies the start time of backup in the format YYMMDDHHMM. Applies when I(state=present).

retentiondays.description: Specifies the retention days for the backup. Applies when I(state=present).

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_sr.short_description: This module manages remote support assistance configuration on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_sr.description: Ansible interface to manage 'chsra' support remote assistance command.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the M(ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_auth) module.

state.description: Enables (C(enabled)) or disables (C(disabled)) the remote support assistance.

support.description: Specifies the support assistance through C(remote) or C(onsite).

name.description: Specifies the list of unique names for the support center or proxy to be defined. Required when I(support=remote), to enable remote support assistance.

sra_ip.description: Specifies the list of IP addresses or fully qualified domain names for the new support center or proxy server. Required when I(support=remote) and I(state=enabled), to enable support remote assistannce.

sra_port.description: Specifies the list of port numbers for the new support center or proxy server. Required when I(support=remote) and I(state=enabled), to enable support remote assistannce.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_us.short_description: This module manages user on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_us.description: Ansible interface to manage 'mkuser', 'rmuser', and 'chuser' commands.

name.description: Specifies the unique username.

state.description: Creates or updates (C(present)) or removes (C(absent)) a user.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

user_password.description: Specifies the password associated with the user. Applies when I(state=present).

nopassword.description: Specifies that the user's password is to be deleted. Applies when I(state=present), to modify a user.

keyfile.description: Specifies the name of the file containing the Secure Shell (SSH) public key. Applies when I(state=present).

nokey.description: Specifies that the user's SSH key is to be deleted. Applies when I(state=present), to modify a user.

auth_type.description: Specifies whether the user authenticates to the system using a remote authentication service or system authentication methods. Only supported value is 'usergrp'. Required when I(state=present), to create a user.

usergroup.description: Specifies the name of the user group with which the local user is to be associated. Applies when I(state=present) and I(auth_type=usergrp).

forcepasswordchange.description: Specifies that the password is to be changed on next login. Applies when I(state=present), to modify a user.

lock.description: Specifies to lock the account indefinitely. The user cannot log in unless unlocked again with the parameter I(unlock). Applies when I(state=present), to modify a user. Parameters I(lock) and I(unlock) are mutually exclusive.

unlock.description: Specifies to unlock the account so it can be logged in to again. Applies when I(state=present), to modify a user. Parameters I(lock) and I(unlock) are mutually exclusive.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_us.short_description: This module manages user group on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_us.description: Ansible interface to manage 'mkusergrp', 'rmusergrp', and 'chusergrp' commands.

name.description: Specifies the name of the user group.

state.description: Creates or updates (C(present)) or removes (C(absent)) a user group.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

role.description: Specifies the role associated with all users that belong to this user group. Required when I(state=present).

ownershipgroup.description: Specifies the name of the ownership group. Applies when I(state=present). Parameters I(ownershipgroup) and I(noownershipgroup) are mutually exclusive.

noownershipgroup.description: Specifies that the usergroup is removed from the ownership group it belonged to. Applies when I(state=present), to modify a user group. Parameters I(ownershipgroup) and I(noownershipgroup) are mutually exclusive.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_vo.short_description: This module manages standard volumes on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_vo.description: Ansible interface to manage 'mkvolume', 'rmvolume', and 'chvdisk' volume commands.

name.description: Specifies the name to assign to the new volume.

state.description: Creates or updates (C(present)) or removes (C(absent)) a volume.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP or Partition IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

pool.description: Specifies the name of the storage pool to use while creating the volume. This parameter is required when I(state=present), to create a volume.

size.description: Defines the size of the volume. This parameter can also be used to resize an existing volume. Required when I(state=present), to create or modify a volume.

warning.description: Raises a warning when the used disk capacity on the thin-provisioned copy first exceeds the specified threshold. The value is specified as a percentage of the total capacity of the thin-provisioned volume, hence it must be between 0 and 100. When not specified, the default value is 80%. Valid when I(state=present), to create or modify a thin-provisioned or compressed volume.

unit.description: Specifies the data units to use with the capacity that is specified by the 'size' parameter. I(size) is required when using I(unit).

iogrp.description: Specifies the list of I/O group names. Group names in the list must be separated by using a comma. While creating a new volume, the first I/O group in the list is added as both cached & access I/O group, while remaining I/O groups are added as access I/O groups. This parameter supports update functionality. Valid when I(state=present), to create or modify a volume.

thin.description: Specifies that a thin-provisioned volume is to be created. Parameters 'thin' and 'compressed' are mutually exclusive. Valid when I(state=present), to create a thin-provisioned volume.

type.description: Specifies the type of volume to create. Volume can be thinclone or clone type. Valid when I(state=present), to create a thinclone or clone volume. Supported from Storage Virtualize family systems from 8.6.2.0 or later. Also used to convert a thinclone volume to clone. type = clone should be specified.

fromsourcevolume.description: Specifies the volume name in the snapshot used to pre-populate clone or thinclone volume. Valid when I(state=present), to create a thinclone or clone volume. Supported from Storage Virtualize family systems from 8.6.2.0 or later.

compressed.description: Specifies that a compressed volume is to be created. Parameters 'compressed' and 'thin' are mutually exclusive. Valid when I(state=present), to create a compressed volume.

buffersize.description: Specifies the pool capacity that the volume will reserve as a buffer for thin-provisioned and compressed volumes. Parameter 'thin' or 'compressed' must be specified to use this parameter. The default buffer size is 2%. I(thin) or I(compressed) is required when using I(buffersize). Valid when I(state=present), to create a volume.

deduplicated.description: Specifies that a deduplicated volume is to be created. Required when I(state=present), to create a deduplicated volume.

volumegroup.description: Specifies the name of the volumegroup to which the volume is to be added. Parameters 'volumegroup' and 'novolumegroup' are mutually exclusive. Valid when I(state=present), to create or modify a volume.

novolumegroup.description: If specified `True`, the volume is removed from its associated volumegroup. Parameters 'novolumegroup' and 'volumegroup' are mutually exclusive. Valid when I(state=present), to modify a volume.

unmap.description: Removes specified objects associated with the volume which is to be deleted. Valid when I(state=absent), to delete a volume.

old_name.description: Specifies the old name of the volume during renaming. Valid when I(state=present), to rename an existing volume.

enable_cloud_snapshot.description: Specify to enable or disable cloud snapshot. Valid when I(state=present), to modify an existing volume.

cloud_account_name.description: Specifies the name of the cloud account name. Valid when I(enable_cloud_snapshot=true).

allow_hs.description: If specified `True`, manages the hyperswap volume by ignoring the volume type validation. Valid when I(state=present), to modify an existing volume.

grainsize.description: Sets the grain size for a thin-provisioned volume.

preferrednode.description: Specifies the preferred node name that is used to access the volume. When not specified, the system selects the preferred node automatically.

cache.description: Specifies the caching options for the volume. When not specified, the default value is 'readwrite'.

autoexpand.description: Specifies whether thin-provisioned volume copies automatically expand their real capacities. If specified as off, works as `noautoexpand`.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_vo.short_description: This module manages volume groups on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_vo.description: Ansible interface to manage 'mkvolumegroup', 'chvolumegroup', and 'rmvolumegroup' commands.

name.description: Specifies the name for the volume group.

state.description: Creates or updates (C(present)) or removes (C(absent)) a volume group.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP or Partition IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the M(ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_auth) module.

ownershipgroup.description: Specifies the name of the ownership group to which the object is being added. I(ownershipgroup) is mutually exclusive with parameters I(safeguardpolicyname) and I(noownershipgroup). Applies when I(state=present).

noownershipgroup.description: If specified `True`, the object is removed from the ownership group to which it belongs. Parameters I(ownershipgroup) and I(noownershipgroup) are mutually exclusive. Applies when I(state=present) to modify an existing volume group.

safeguardpolicyname.description: The name of the Safeguarded policy to be assigned to the volume group. I(safeguardpolicyname) is mutually exclusive with parameters I(nosafeguardpolicy) and I(ownershipgroup). Applies when I(state=present).

nosafeguardpolicy.description: If specified `True`, removes the Safeguarded policy assigned to the volume group. Parameters I(safeguardpolicyname) and I(nosafeguardpolicy) are mutually exclusive. Applies when I(state=present) to modify an existing volume group.

snapshotpolicy.description: The name of the snapshot policy to be assigned to the volume group. I(snapshotpolicy) is mutually exclusive with parameters I(nosnapshotpolicy) and I(ownershipgroup). Applies when I(state=present).

nosnapshotpolicy.description: If specified `True`, removes the snapshot policy assigned to the volume group. Parameters I(snapshotpolicy) and I(nosnapshotpolicy) are mutually exclusive. Applies when I(state=present) to modify an existing volume group.

snapshotpolicysuspended.description: Specifies whether to suspend (C(yes)) or resume (C(no)) the snapshot policy on this volume group. Applies when I(state=present) to modify an existing volume group.

policystarttime.description: Specifies the time when the first Safeguarded backup is to be taken. This parameter can also be associated with snapshot policy. I(safeguardpolicyname) is required when using I(policystarttime). The accepted format is YYMMDDHHMM. Applies when I(state=present).

type.description: Specifies the type of volume group to be created from the snapshot. Valid during creation of host accessible volume group from an existing snapshot. Also used to convert a thinclone volumegroup to clone. type = clone should be specified.

snapshot.description: Specifies the name of the snapshot used to prepopulate the new volumes in the new volume group. Required when creating a host accessible volume group from an existing snapshot.

fromsourcegroup.description: Specifies the parent volume group of the snapshot. This is used to prepopulate the new volume in the new volume group. Valid during creation of host accessible volume group from an existing snapshot.

pool.description: Specifies the pool name where the target volumes are to be created. Valid during creation of host accessible volume group from an existing snapshot.

iogrp.description: Specifies the I/O group for new volumes. Valid during creation of host accessible volume group from an existing snapshot.

safeguarded.description: If specified, the snapshot policy creates safeguarded snapshots. Should be specified along with I(snapshotpolicy). Valid during creation and update of a volume group. Supported from Storage Virtualize family systems 8.5.2.0 or later.

ignoreuserfcmaps.description: Allows user to create snapshots through the scheduler or manually with `addsnapshot`. This can only be used if a volume in the volume group is used as a source of a user legacy FlashCopy mapping. Valid during creation and update of a volume group. Supported from Storage Virtualize family systems 8.5.2.0 or later.

replicationpolicy.description: Specifies the name of the replication policy to be assigned to the volume group. Applies when I(state=present). Supported from Storage Virtualize family systems 8.5.2.1 or later.

noreplicationpolicy.description: If specified `True`, removes the replication policy assigned to the volume group. I(noreplicationpolicy) is mutually exclusive with parameters I(replicationpolicy) and I(nodrreplication). Applies when I(state=present) to modify an existing volume group. Supported from Storage Virtualize family systems 8.5.2.1 or later.

old_name.description: Specifies the old name of the volume group during renaming. Valid when I(state=present), to rename an existing volume group.

partition.description: Specifies the name of the storage partition to be assigned to the volume group. Applies when I(state=present). Supported from Storage Virtualize family systems 8.6.1.0 or later.

evictvolumes.description: If specified `True`, delete the volume group but does not remove volumes. Applies when I(state=absent) to delete the volume group, keeping associated volumes. Supported from Storage Virtualize family systems from 8.6.2.0 or later.

fromsourcevolumes.description: Specifies colon-separated list of the parent volumes. When combined with the type parameter and a snapshot, this allows the user to create a volumegroup with a subset of those volumes whose image is present in a snapshot. Applies when I(state=present) to create volumegroup clone or thinclone, from subset of volumes of snapshot. Supported from Storage Virtualize family systems from 8.6.2.0 or later.

draftpartition.description: Specifies the name of the draft partition to be assigned to the volume group. Applies when I(state=present). Supported from Storage Virtualize family systems 8.6.3.0 or later.

nodrreplication.description: If specified `True`, removes the volume group from the async-dr replication policy. I(nodrreplication) is mutually exclusive with parameters I(replicationpolicy) and I(noreplicationpolicy). Applies when I(state=present) to modify an existing volume group. Supported from Storage Virtualize family systems 8.7.1.0 or later.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_mdisk.short_description: This module manages MDisks on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_mdisk.description: Ansible interface to manage 'mkarray' and 'rmmdisk' MDisk commands.

name.description: The MDisk name.

state.description: Creates (C(present)) or removes (C(absent)) the MDisk.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

drive.description: Drive(s) to use as members of the RAID array. Required when I(state=present), to create an MDisk array.

mdiskgrp.description: The storage pool (mdiskgrp) to which you want to add the MDisk.

level.description: Specifies the RAID level. Required when I(state=present), to create an MDisk array.

encrypt.description: Defines use of encryption with the MDisk group. Applies when I(state=present).

driveclass.description: Specifies the class that is being used to create the array. Applies when I(state=present).

drivecount.description: Specifies the number of the drives. The value must be a number in the range 2 - 128. Applies when I(state=present).

stripewidth.description: Specifies the width of a single unit of redundancy within a distributed set of drives The value must be a number in the range 2 - 16. Applies when I(state=present).

tier.description: Specifies the new tier of the MDisk.

old_name.description: Specifies the old name of an existing pool. Applies when I(state=present), to rename the existing pool.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_mdiskgrp.short_description: This module manages pools on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_mdiskgrp.description: Ansible interface to manage 'mkmdiskgrp' and 'rmmdiskgrp' pool commands.

name.description: Specifies the name to assign to the new pool.

state.description: Creates (C(present)) or removes (C(absent)) an MDisk group.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the M(ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_auth) module.

datareduction.description: Defines use of data reduction pools (DRPs) on the MDisk group. Applies when I(state=present), to create a pool.

easytier.description: Defines use of easytier with the MDisk group. Applies when I(state=present), to create a pool.

encrypt.description: Defines use of encryption with the MDisk group. Applies when I(state=present), to create a pool.

ext.description: Specifies the size of the extents for this group in MB. Applies when I(state=present), to create a pool.

parentmdiskgrp.description: Parentmdiskgrp for subpool. Applies when I(state=present), to create a pool.

safeguarded.description: Specify to create a safeguarded child pool. Applicable only during child pool creation.

noquota.description: Specify to create a data reduction child pool. I(noquota) and I(size) parameters are mutually exclusive. I(noquota) parameter must be used with I(datareduction) set to yes to create a data reduction child pool. I(noquota) parameter must be used with I(parentmdiskgrp) in a parent data reduction storage pool.

unit.description: Unit for subpool. Applies when I(state=present), to create a pool.

provisioningpolicy.description: Specify the name of the provisioning policy to map it with the pool. Applies, when I(state=present).

noprovisioningpolicy.description: Specify to unmap provisioning policy from the pool. Applies, when I(state=present) to modify an existing pool.

replicationpoollinkuid.description: Specifies the replication pool unique identifier which should be same as the pool that present in the replication server. Applies, when I(state=present). Supported in SV build 8.5.2.1 or later.

resetreplicationpoollinkuid.description: If set, any links between this pool on local system and pools on remote systems will be removed. Applies, when I(state=present) to modify an existing pool. Supported in SV build 8.5.2.1 or later.

replication_partner_clusterid.description: Specifies the id or name of the partner cluster for setting replication pool linked systems mask. Applies, when I(state=present). Supported in SV build 8.5.2.1 or later.

size.description: Specifies the child pool capacity. The value must be a numeric value (and an integer multiple of the extent size). Applies when I(state=present), to create a pool.

warning.description: If specified, generates a warning when the used disk capacity in the storage pool first exceeds the specified threshold. The default value is 80. To disable it, specify the value as 0. Applies when I(state=present) while creating the pool.

ownershipgroup.description: Specifies the name of the ownershipgroup to map it with the pool. Applies when I(state=present).

noownershipgroup.description: Specifies to unmap ownershipgroup from the pool. Applies when I(state=present) to modify an existing pool.

vdiskprotectionenabled.description: Specifies whether volume protection is enabled for this storage pool. The default value is 'yes'. Applies when I(state=present).

etfcmoverallocationmax.description: Specifies the maximum over allocation which Easy Tier can migrate onto FlashCore Module arrays, when the array is used as the top tier in a multitier pool. The value acts as a multiplier of the physically available space. The allowed values are a percentage in the range of 100% (default) to 400% or off. Setting the value to off disables this feature. Applies when I(state=present).

old_name.description: Specifies the old name of an existing pool. Applies when I(state=present), to rename the existing pool.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_start_sto.short_description: This module starts or stops FlashCopy mapping and consistency groups on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_start_sto.description: Ansible interface to manage 'startfcmap', 'stopfcmap', 'startfcconsistgrp', and 'stopfcconsistgrp' commands.

name.description: Specifies the name of the FlashCopy mapping or FlashCopy consistency group.

state.description: Starts (C(started)) or stops (C(stopped)) a FlashCopy mapping or FlashCopy consistency group.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

isgroup.description: If specified True, the associated I(name) parameter is set as name of the FlashCopy consistency group. If specified False, or unspecified, the associated I(name) parameter is set as name of the FlashCopy mapping.

force.description: Specifies that all processing associated with the FlashCopy mapping or FlashCopy consistency group be immediately stopped. Valid when I(state=stopped), to stop a FlashCopy mapping or FlashCopy consistency group.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_start_sto.short_description: This module starts or stops remote copies on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_start_sto.description: Ansible interface to manage remote copy related commands.

name.description: Specifies a name to assign to the new remote copy relationship or group, or to operate on the existing remote copy.

state.description: Starts (C(started)) or stops (C(stopped)) a remote copy relationship.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

primary.description: Specifies the copy direction by defining which disk becomes the primary (source). Applies when I(state=started).

isgroup.description: Specifies that a consistency group has to be started or stopped.

clean.description: Specifies that the volume that is to become a secondary is clean. Applies when I(state=started).

access.description: Instructs the system to allow write access to a consistent secondary volume. Applies when I(state=stopped).

force.description: Specifies that the system must process the copy operation even if it causes a temporary loss of consistency during synchronization. Applies when I(state=started).

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_vol_map.short_description: This module manages volume mapping on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_vol_map.description: Ansible interface to manage volume mapping commands 'mkvdiskhostmap', 'rmvdiskhostmap', 'mkvolumehostclustermap', and 'rmvolumehostclustermap'.

volname.description: Specifies the volume name for host or hostcluster mapping.

host.description: Specifies the host name for host mapping. This parameter is required to create or delete a volume-to-host mapping.

hostcluster.description: Specifies the name of the host cluster for host mapping. This parameter is required to create or delete a volume-to-hostcluster mapping.

scsi.description: Specifies the SCSI logical unit number (LUN) ID to assign to a volume on the specified host or host cluster. Applies when I(state=present).

state.description: Creates (C(present)) or removes (C(absent)) a volume mapping.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP or Partition IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

password.description: REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters I(username) and I(password) are required if not using I(token) to authenticate a user.

token.description: The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svcinfo_comma.short_description: This module implements SSH Client which helps to run svcinfo CLI command on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svcinfo_comma.description: Runs single svcinfo CLI command on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems. Filter options like filtervalue or pipe '|' with grep, awk, and others are not supported in the command in this module. Paramiko must be installed to use this module.

command.description: Single svcinfo CLI command to be executed on Storage Virtualize system.

usesshkey.description: For key-pair based SSH connection, set this field as C('yes'). Provide full path of keyfile in key_filename field. If not provided, default path of SSH key is used.

key_filename.description: SSH client private key filename. By default, C(~/.ssh/id_rsa) is used.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP or Partition IP of the storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize storage system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: Username for the Storage Virtualize system.

password.description: Password for the Storage Virtualize system.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svctask_comma.short_description: This module implements SSH Client which helps to run svctask CLI command(s) on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svctask_comma.description: Runs svctask and satask CLI command(s) on IBM Storage Virtualize Family systems. In case any command fails while running this module, then the module stops processing further commands in the list. Paramiko must be installed to use this module.

command.description: A list containing svctask CLI commands to be executed on storage.

usesshkey.description: For key-pair based SSH connection, set this field as "yes". Provide full path of key in key_filename field. If not provided, default path of SSH key is used.

key_filename.description: SSH client private key filename. By default, ~/.ssh/id_rsa is used.

clustername.description: The hostname or management IP or Partition IP of the Storage Virtualize system.

domain.description: Domain for the Storage Virtualize storage system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter I(clustername).

username.description: Username for the Storage Virtualize system.

password.description: Password for the Storage Virtualize system.
